name: cron-collaboration-dashboard
description: Enterprise cron job collaboration dashboard with advanced analytics and predictive intelligence

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:analytics"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:analytics
scripts.build:analytics: cd analytics && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:frontend -- --coverage && npm run test:backend -- --coverage
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:frontend -- --fix && npm run lint:backend -- --fix
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../tests && npm install
scripts.deploy: npm run build && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d

author: Cron Dashboard Team
